title: New records of thrips from Karnataka, India
author: Tyagi, Kaomud
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Four species, two each in the subfamily Idolothripinae and Phlaeothripinae are being reported for the first time from Karnataka State, India. Diagnostic features, distribution and data on material studied for these species are given.
